title: Clippit word compare result
description: Result payload of `clippit word compare` written to stdout in JSON mode.

source.description: Absolute path of the source .docx file, or '<stdin>' when read from stdin.

revised.description: Absolute path of the revised .docx file, or '<stdin>' when read from stdin.

output.description: Absolute path of the compared output file, or '<stdout>' when written to stdout.

outputSize.description: Size of the compared output .docx file in bytes.

revisions.description: Number of revisions extracted from the compared result.

authorForRevisions.description: Author metadata used for generated revisions.

dateTimeForRevisions.description: Date/time metadata used for generated revisions.

caseInsensitive.description: Whether case-insensitive compare mode was enabled.
